title: Venezuelan Coconut Empanadas
description: A sweet and delicious dessert empanada filled with coconut and perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Unroll empanada dough and cut into 4 equal pieces.
Mix coconut, sugar, and honey in a bowl.
Place a tablespoon of the coconut mixture onto the center of each empanada piece.
Brush the edges with coconut oil.
Fold the empanadas in half and press the edges to seal.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops with coconut oil.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
